title: Loop → RSI → ASI governance state machine

states.purpose: Convert work into evidence, validation, receipts, and Chronicle memory.
Convert invention pressure into deterministic, replayable, baseline-comparative artifacts.
Treat potential ASI-scale escalation as bounded, stress-tested, council-reviewed, and rollback-ready.

invariant: No promotion from one state to the next without proof, baseline comparison, risk gate, persistence, human authority, and rollback path.
